content.full_text:
Mendocino City Community Services District  
Post Office Box 1029  
Mendocino, California 95460

Business Phone (707) 937-5790    Treatment Plant (707) 937-5751

March 1, 1991

State of California  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0814

Dear Commissioners:

I am a member of the Mendocino City Community Services District and am presently the chairperson. We are in the process of installing a community water system in the Services District and I want to be assured by someone on your commission that I am able to vote on any and all phases.

I have a second Trust Deed on the Whitegate Inn, a five room inn and one of the prominent Bed & Breakfast in our community. It is a fixed mortgage of approximately $120,000.00. Although the community water system will increase the value of the Inn, I would not receive any more or less upon the sale of the property.

As we are actively working on this issue, I would appreciate your response as soon as possible.

If you should have any questions please contact me at (707) 937-2102.

Sincerely,

Herbert Lobell  
President
